babyDevelopment: The baby's lungs and central nervous system are almost fully mature. The fat layers are thickening, giving the baby the familiar 'chubby' appearance. The baby is likely staying in a head-down position now.
bodyChanges: You might feel 'lightening' as the baby's head settles lower into your pelvis. This might make breathing easier but increase pressure on your bladder. You may experience occasional 'numbness' in your legs or groin.
tips: Finalize your birth plan with your doctor
Incorporate more Vitamin K-rich foods if safe

dont: Panic if you feel increased pelvic pressure

travelAdvisory.note: Highly recommended to stay close to your birthing facility.

milestoneDescription: Baby's lungs are reaching a high level of maturity, preparing for the first breath.
